common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this API to set address config of your shop.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Cannot set inbound pickup address for this address.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Inbound pickup address invalid state & city, state&city must be the same as kyc.billing_address state&city or fbs_branch.billing_address state&city.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Inbound pickup address cannot be the same as Shopee warehouse address.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: BR pickup address SRN is invalid

solution.content:
The matched SRN exists but its status is invalid.

​

children.data: The matched SRN exists but its status is invalid.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: BR pickup address SRN record not found

solution.content: The selected pickup address state does not have a valid SRN record.

children.data: The selected pickup address state does not have a valid SRN record.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: BR pickup address state does not match SRN

solution.content: The pickup address state does not match the seller KYC / SRN information.

children.data: The pickup address state does not match the seller KYC / SRN information.

children.name: address_id

children.description: The type of address. Available values: DEFAULT_ADDRESS, PICKUP_ADDRESS, RETURN_ADDRESS, INBOUND_PICKUP_ADDRESS.

request_params.description: The config of your shop addres.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
